news.t: 9 New ETFs for Investors to Unwrap
Dimensional Adds Three New US Equity ETFs to Growing Offering

holdings.infoBox: DUHP is an equity ETF with a total of 163 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.42%, Apple at 6.78%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.92%, Microsoft at 4.24%, and Visa Inc. at 3.84%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US High Profitability ETF (DUHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund invests in a broad and diverse group of large-cap US stocks actively selected based on perceived higher profitability relative to other US large-cap companies. DUHP was launched on Feb 23, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: 9 New ETFs for Investors to Unwrap
data.text: The U.S. exchange-traded fund (ETF) industry had quite a year in 2021 – due in part to the 445 new ETFs that launched, 44% more than did in 2020. U.S. ETFs ended the year with record assets of $7.21 t...

data.title: Dimensional Adds Three New US Equity ETFs to Growing Offering
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors, a global leader in systematic multifactor investing, expanded its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) offering with today's listing of three new US ...
